/usr/local/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/screenshot_bin.dir/screenshot_bin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screenshot_bin.dir/screenshot.cpp.o  -o screenshot_bin -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhangfq/Method-II/HydrogenOrbitalViewer/colorPicker/Qt-Color-Widgets/color_widgets_designer_plugin /usr/lib64/libQt5Widgets.so.5.9.2 ../libQtColorWidgets-Qt52.so.2.0.0 /usr/lib64/libQt5Gui.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Core.so.5.9.2
